raw_source.title: [远程] Cryptape秘猿招聘Rust Developer
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
秘猿Cryptape的使命是用技术创造信任，为未来数字世界构建新的基础设施和服务。秘猿长期专注于拓展分布式网络基础理论和技术的研究发展，在区块链领域实力深厚。
- 我们的网站：[https://www.cryptape.com/](https://www.cryptape.com/)
- 我们的代码：[https://github.com/cryptape](https://github.com/cryptape)
- 我们的博客：[https://blog.cryptape.com/](https://blog.cryptape.com/)
- 我们的研究：[https://blog.cryptape.com/series/research](https://blog.cryptape.com/series/research)

## 薪资福利待遇
25-45k 
全远程办公，五险一金，上下班不打卡；部门团建，公费Outing；节假日福利，生日福利；体检，商业医疗保险等。

## 地点

- 工作地点：远程
- 联系方式：join@cryptape.com（合适的简历一般1-2天内回复联系，谢谢）

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：是

## 岗位要求、职责
## Rust Developer

**Responsibilities**

- Design, develop, and maintain Rust-based applications on the Nervos CKB blockchain platform
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams including core developers, community members, and other stakeholders to deliver high-quality software on time
- Build new features, optimize performance, and improve overall code quality
- Participate in code reviews and technical discussions to enhance the team's technical capabilities
- Continuously research and evaluate new technologies, frameworks, and libraries to improve development efficiency and project quality

**Requirements**

- Proficient in Rust programming language and its ecosystem, with experience in building and deploying applications on the Nervos CKB platform
- Familiar with blockchain technology, particularly with smart contract development and application integration
- Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and computer science principles
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
- Good communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a remote team environment
- Excellent English reading, writing, and basic speaking skills

**Preferred Qualifications**

- Experience with other programming languages, such as C/C++, Go, or Js/Ts
- Familiarity with Rust-based blockchain development tools and frameworks
- Passionate about open-source software development and blockchain technology

## Projects Involved

- Nervos CKB：Nervos Network 是一个开源的公链生态，Nervos CKB 是基于Pow共识机制的底层公链。 [https://www.nervos.org/](https://www.nervos.org/)
- Axon ：Layer 2 Sidechain 框架，100% 兼容以太坊，专为游戏或社交网络等需要高吞吐量的应用而设计。 [https://github.com/nervosnetwork/axon](https://github.com/nervosnetwork/axon)

## 工作环境
秘猿一直保持浓厚的工程师文化和 geek 氛围，注重人才的发展，鼓励技术分享，坚持“小而美”。全员 remote work 多年，看重结果而非形式，为共同创业的小伙伴们创造了一个充满自由、尊重和信任的工作环境。如果你也拥有一个创业梦想，渴望用技术改变世界，欢迎加入我们！

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
